handoff.reason: Workorder fully planned and ready for Phase 1 execution

execution_rules.phase_gate: hard_stop after Phase 1 — review coverage numbers before Phase 2
execution_rules.rollback: git checkout HEAD -- . to restore any corrupted source files

hard_constraints: Layer enum values must come from STANDARDS/layers.json only
No LLM calls for layer inference — path patterns only

decisions_log.decision: Phase 1 required --overwrite-headers in addition to --source-headers to fix headers misplaced by insertHeaders() position bug
decisions_log.rationale: insertHeaders() was inserting coderef header after existing JSDoc blocks. detectHeaderBlock() only reads the first /** block, so those files showed missing even after Phase 1 write. Fix: insert coderef header first (before all other content). --overwrite-headers required to reposition existing headers.

decisions_log.decision: Three bugs fixed before Phase 1 could complete: hasSemanticHeader false positive, insertHeaders wrong position, generateHeadersFromElements skip-empty files
decisions_log.rationale: All three bugs were blocking the Phase 1 goal of 0 missing headers. Fixed inline rather than creating sub-workorders.

phase_transitions.result: 0 missing, 0 stale, 2384 defined, 42 partial across 2426 elements
99.0% layer coverage (2404/2428 elements), inferLayerFromPath + inferCapabilityFromPath exported

close_metadata.review_verdict_source: Step 3 audit — align-coderef-culture PASS, tracking-validator 15/15 PASS

communication_log.summary: Workorder created from dogfood scan findings. 2 phases: first-time header pass + path-inference layer seeding.

plan_deviations: ADJ-01: Phase 1 needed --overwrite-headers due to insertHeaders position bug
ADJ-02: 3 bugs fixed before Phase 1 could succeed

communication_log.message: Workorder closed via /close-workorder. Audit PASS (cultural gate PASS, tracking 15/15 PASS, dependency vulnerableCount=0). Both phases verified complete. Archive pending.
